positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a mythical forest creature, such as a bioluminescent fox or celestial owl, nestled among stylized, deep-sea flora and glowing mycelium. The creature should have clean, symmetrical silhouettes and vibrant, contrasting colors (electric blues, deep purples, glowing aquamarines, and neon greens). Composition must be central and visually balanced, designed to look excellent as a repeating or single-placement apparel print. Use a high-contrast, Art Deco aesthetic mixed with ethereal bioluminescence. Intricate detail, deep blacks, and sharp lines are essential. Clean edges, vector art sensibility.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, photographic, 3d render, photorealism
